prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: wide TaraHome technical blog cover for a non-product Matter-over-Wi-Fi troubleshooting article
Primary request: a clean editorial photograph of a homeowner calmly diagnosing one smart-home device that has gone offline over Wi-Fi
Scene/backdrop: warm, lived-in modern living room with natural oak, off-white plaster, woven linen, a plug-in table lamp, and one restrained dark-green ceramic accent; practical middle-class home, not a luxury showroom
Subject: an adult homeowner naturally crouched beside an ordinary wall outlet and checking a compact unbranded plug-in smart device; an ordinary home Wi-Fi router sits visibly on an open oak shelf several feet away; a smartphone with a completely dark unreadable screen rests face-up nearby; the person is inspecting the physical setup, not posing
Style/medium: photorealistic residential editorial photography, candid and believable, not a render
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, eye-level, balanced for a full article hero and center article-card crop; the homeowner, plug-in device, lamp, and router remain recognizable at small size; natural depth of field with all key subjects plausibly placed in one room
Lighting/mood: soft late-afternoon window light plus a warm lamp glow, calm, practical, trustworthy, true-to-life color
Color palette: warm wood, cream, muted charcoal, restrained Tara dark green accent
Materials/textures: visible oak grain, woven linen, matte ceramic, natural skin and fabric texture, normal lived-in imperfections
Constraints: ordinary category-level household devices only with no brand marks and no claim of an exact commercial model; anatomically correct hands; no readable screen content; no text; no logo; no watermark; no embedded headline or title poster; no fake chart or graph; no decorative routing/network/path lines; no connection trails; no translucent panels; no inset frames; no floating UI cards; no progress bars
Avoid: invented futuristic hardware, generic AI-looking smart-home diagram, sci-fi interface, staged product lineup, excessive beige, duplicated objects, distorted hands, glossy CGI surfaces
